name: /standards-diff rejects a decision value that is not one of Adopt Defer or Reject
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'r: a\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml && printf 'r: b\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-diff.sh" --source owasp-asvs --current standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml --upstream standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml --decide ignore --change r --decisions standards/decisions.jsonl 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_decision' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=adopt|defer|reject' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
